nodes.label: the depth wall
nodes.rationale: SCFF features degrade with depth: per-layer probe declines monotonically toward chance on CIFAR-10-flat. Every Phase-2 lever must bend this curve upward; it is the reference curve for P2.1+.

nodes.label: the substrate collision (README §0)
nodes.rationale: SCFF's algorithmic strength is width, but the Scap-capacitor substrate's cheap physical axis is depth (a deep crossbar); Phase 2 tests whether these can be reconciled.
